[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11110101 6
1 01001000 2
2 01011010 4
3 10010011 4
4 10110000 3
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 00000100 1

01 10 00000000 a match 5 6
12 21 10000000 1
23 32 10010100 3
34 43 01000000 1
45 54 01001000 2 match 1
56 65 00010010 2
67 76 10010000 2
70 07 00000000 a match 5 6

02 20 00000100 1 match 7
13 31 10000001 2
24 42 00001000 1
35 53 01010000 2
46 64 00000000 a match 5 6
57 75 00010000 1
60 06 00000000 a match 5 6
71 17 10000000 1

50 05 00000000 a match 5 6
61 16 10000001 2
72 27 10010000 2

04 40 00000000 a match 5 6

37 73 10110000 3 match 4
